arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Napoli: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Inter Milan gear up for their highly anticipated match against Napoli, manager Simone Inzaghi finds himself with a wealth of options for his starting lineup. Following his unexpected team selection in the midweek Champions League fixture against Arsenal, Inzaghi has the luxury of further rotation, with only Carlos Augusto unavailable due to injury. The return of experienced center-back Francesco Acerbi to full training adds another dimension to Inzaghi’s defensive choices. After being an unused substitute in the Arsenal match, Acerbi could potentially make his return to the starting eleven this weekend. arts.ttl: A top-of-the-table clash between Inter and Napoli
arts.sum: Napoli have won just one of their last 10 matches against Inter in Serie A - a 3-1 win, at Maradona, in May 2023, with goals scored by Anguissa, Di Lorenzo and Gaetano - drawing three of those (including the most recent one in March) and losing six in the process. Napoli have lost seven of their last 12 games (W1 D3) played against Inter in Serie A; in the period (since the 2018-19 season), the Nerazzurri are the team against which the Neapolitans have suffered the most defeats in the competition.
